seo.title: Our Therapies for Addiction & Mental Health | Des Moines Wellness Center | Alcohol & Drug Rehab Iowa
seo.description: Explore our evidence-based therapies for addiction in Des Moines, including CBT, DBT, trauma-informed care, family therapy, and dual diagnosis treatment.

hero.headline: Evidence-Based Therapies for Real Addiction Treatment
hero.subhead: At Des Moines Wellness Center, our clinical therapies are engineered by our medical staff to reach long-lasting sobriety. We provide a range of staff-led, science-backed protocols designed for patients ready to achieve permanent recovery in Iowa.

image.alt: Group of people in drug rehab at des moines rediscovering happiness

sections.heading: Science-Backed Therapy for Modern Recovery
body: While medical detox manages the physical symptoms of withdrawal, our behavioral health programs address the psychological triggers of addiction. Our medical staff integrates a range of evidence-based modalities designed to rewire habitual responses and restore executive function. By utilizing these specific clinical tools, we ensure that every patient in Central Iowa is equipped with a verified roadmap for maintaining sobriety after they leave our facility. We guarantee:

items.title: Integrated Dual Diagnosis Support To Treat the Root Causes

sections.heading: Clinical Modalities for Emotional & Behavioral Stability
body: Our medical staff utilizes these six core modalities to create a custom therapeutic roadmap for every patient. The specific blend and frequency of these sessions are never fixed; they are determined by our clinicians based on your unique history, current symptoms, and clinical needs. By adjusting the intensity of your care in real-time, we ensure that your treatment evolves alongside your progress here in Des Moines.

items.title: Individual Therapy
items.text: Private sessions with board-certified counselors to process personal history, set goals, and develop individualized relapse prevention strategies.

items.title: Group Therapy
items.text: Peer-supported recovery. These facilitated sessions reduce isolation by connecting you with others facing similar challenges, providing a safe environment to practice social skills and emotional accountability.

items.title: Family Therapy
items.text: Systemic restoration. We facilitate dedicated sessions to repair communication and educate your support system on the science of addiction, ensuring a stable environment for your return home.

items.title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
items.text: Pattern recognition. Our staff utilizes CBT to identify the automatic negative thoughts and environmental triggers that lead to substance use, replacing them with practical, proactive coping mechanisms.

items.title: Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)
items.text: Emotional regulation. Specifically designed for dual-diagnosis care, DBT provides the tools needed for distress tolerance and interpersonal effectiveness, helping you manage intense emotions without drugs or alcohol.

items.title: Trauma-Informed Care
items.text: Safety-first processing. We recognize the impact of past trauma on addiction. Our clinicians use specialized protocols to process these experiences and reduce hyper-vigilance without causing re-traumatization.

sections.heading: A Trusted Clinical Partner for Recovery in Iowa

image.alt: Patients celebrating recovery milestones and clinical progress at our Des Moines facility.

sections.heading: Our 3-Step Clinical Framework
body: We don’t believe in static treatment plans. At Des Moines Wellness Center, your therapy evolves as you do. Our staff utilizes a dynamic 3-step framework that prioritizes real-time adjustments based on your specific clinical milestones and recovery speed.

items.title: 1. Precision Intake & Programming
items.text: We conduct a deep-dive assessment to identify your specific behavioral triggers and neurochemical needs. We build an initial therapeutic blend designed for your Day 1 requirements.

items.title: 2. Active Pivots
items.text: As you progress, our team monitors your response to specific modalities like CBT or DBT. If a therapy isn’t producing results, we pivot the protocol immediately, adjusting intensity and frequency in real-time to optimize your stability.

items.title: 3. Recovery Integration
items.text: Once you reach your stabilization milestones, we scale your care toward long-term maintenance. We customize your discharge roadmap to include verified support systems in Central Iowa, ensuring a seamless transition home to Ankeny, West Des Moines and beyond.

sections.heading: Use Your Insurance for Addiction Rehab
body: work with most major private insurance providers, including Wellmark Blue Cross Blue Shield, to make expert clinical care accessible. Our team offers a 100% confidential verification to help you understand your coverage and minimize out-of-pocket costs before you start.
